{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118130175459F65CCCF50ACE6B9"}"},"total":8782},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7355003491024257854","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值得品鉴，开头所介绍以及后面剧情所呈现出来的效果，相互印证，这种与常规的文章形成了鲜明的反差，单从内容来看，便是精彩绝伦，多的不说，少的不唠，无论是第1段的女主还是第2段的女主，描写细节都很完美，唯一的请求就是作者求你快更新呀"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712473217,"group_id":"7330508632573873214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Ap/CUpB6AQ/fyQmcBdpKDe5BAtw5clXPEFjd/jRA3c","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d31ad6a52d5c41a2afda13aad7057373~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616290&x-signature=zRmnhhGiFcq%2BCb%2Fkp2dPg3wjqUc%3D","user_id":"2714063492109127","user_name":"我这小眼神迷不死你"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2714063492109127","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7330508632573873214","book_info":{"abstract":"林余不明白，为什么自己会穿越到这里来。

再不济也是穿越到几十年前，利用信息差发家致富，开启后宫无数。

":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6028,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":59358},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7349174309598200600","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我个人其实是比较喜欢看但女主的，看这本书的剧情应该是多女主，但是剧情的新颖很吸引我，让我看了50张，给我的感觉的很舒服，个人比较喜欢作者设计的人物矛盾，有很多修辞看出文笔也很好，个人比较喜欢唐女主，希望出场多一点吧，题材这么新颖希望不要烂尾和短更，希望跟新可以快一点哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711114919,"group_id":"7330508632573873214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"桀桀桀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1EEJOxAAsDcYWWTJBQjqoU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110692520665","user_name":"小石头0018"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110692520665","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7330508632573873214","book_info":{"abstract":"林余不明白，为什么自己会穿越到这里来。

":8338,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8384,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":59023},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7352388297429205822","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，文采也很好，剧情很细腻，毫不拖泥带水，如果不考虑男主为什么一直要帮女主的原因的话（作者给的理由有些牵强），而是把重点放在那男主对事情与情感的处理上，你就能看出这个小说真正吸引人的地方，不憋屈，也会为别人着想，三观很正，也没有想把她们收入后宫的打算（这点很好），还带点救赎吧，很不错，作者加油，希望你能一直坚持下去！不过，唯一不好的一点是……能不能每天多更两张啊！这些根本不够看啊！[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711864248,"group_id":"7330508632573873214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1PClCky2Nyox/xy3Q98EDi6EEOXquJyT0mWIKQR/jWT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7a3c90c743f24a2c9303c1f7ddfdc755~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615253&x-signature=lC1tn%2BM6ZwYW3FEEYui5fVe2zjQ%3D","user_id":"1245112730396958","user_name":"小天使江慕儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1245112730396958","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7330508632573873214","book_info":{"abstract":"林余不明白，为什么自己会穿越到这里来。
